step_rationale: Fatty-acid oxidation metabolite; ischemic metabolic stress and myocardial energy depletion marker.
mechanism: 2-Hydroxybutyrate, an abnormal fatty-acid oxidation product, marks myocardial ischemic metabolic dysfunction in early acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Plasma metabolomics reveals a potential panel of biomarkers for early diagnosis in acute coronary syndrome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
